findings.evidence: Roadmap grep: `../roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/UniversalCovers/README.md:92-93` states Stage 1 item 5 and the quotient comparison; added declarations are `orbitRelQuotientProj` through `orbitRelQuotientProjEquivOfFiberOrbit` at lines 123-160.
findings.fix: Update the module References text to also credit TauCetiRoadmap/UniversalCovers/README.md Stage 1 item 5 / the `UniversalCover x₀ / π₁(X, x₀) ≃ X` quotient-comparison target.
findings.issue: The reference block credits only UniversalCovers roadmap Stage 0.4 and mathlib4#40135, while the new `orbitRelQuotientProj*` declarations implement bookkeeping for the Stage 1 quotient comparison.

summary: The added quotient-orbit API is credited in the PR description to the UniversalCovers Stage 1 target, but the file-level references still only credit the earlier Stage 0.4 deck-transformation target.
